frameworks.name: reinforcement learning
frameworks.one_line: RL theory prescribes which predictive representations are useful and how to compute them

frameworks.name: successor representation
frameworks.one_line: SR and its generalizations cast as versatile predictive building blocks

frameworks.name: cognitive and neural modeling
frameworks.one_line: SR applied as engineering tool and as model of cognition and brain function

core_question: What kinds of predictive representations support adaptive behavior across engineering and brain function?
key_assumptions: adaptive behavior often requires predicting future events
reinforcement learning theory specifies useful predictive representations
predictive representations can serve both engineering and brain modeling
key_findings: successor representation and its generalizations have been widely applied as engineering tools
the same representations have been deployed as models of brain function
interpretations: particular predictive representations function as versatile building blocks of intelligence
convergence across engineering and neuroscience supports SR-like representations
